name: PEARL: Solver-in-the-Loop Interactive Optimization Modeling from Natural Language

description: arXiv:2607.18256v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Optimization modeling is the process of translating real-world decision problems, often described in natural language, into formal mathematical formulations and executable solver code. While recent advances in large language models have shown promise in automating this process, most existing approaches remain one-shot: a model produces a formulati...
author: Hongliang Lu, Zhong Li, Yuxuan Chen, Yuan Lan, Fan Zhang, Zaiwen Wen
